_comment: Fill in the values below. This file is read by the pipeline at runtime. Keep it out of version control.

_notes.dry_run: Set to false once you have filled in AWS credentials above. While true, NO real AWS calls are made.
_notes.gmail_app_password: Do NOT use your normal Gmail password here. Go to: Google Account > Security > 2-Step Verification > App Passwords. Generate one for 'Mail'.
_notes.aws_keys: Use an IAM user with least-privilege permissions: ec2:StopInstances, lambda:PutFunctionConcurrency, ec2:CreateTags, ec2:DeleteVolume, ec2:CreateSnapshot, sns:Publish.
_notes.region: Set this to the AWS region your resources live in, e.g. ap-south-1 for Mumbai.
